user.title: Choose authentication method
user.description: Samsung deprecated indefinite SmartThings Personal Access Tokens on 2024-12-30 — new PATs expire every 24 hours. Reusing the HA core SmartThings integration's OAuth2 credentials avoids this limit entirely.

menu_options.standalone_oauth: Use my own SmartThings app (standalone OAuth)

standalone_oauth_credentials.title: Standalone SmartThings OAuth — App credentials
standalone_oauth_credentials.description: Enter the client_id and client_secret from your SmartThings OAuth-In app (create one at https://account.smartthings.com/apps).

standalone_oauth_link.title: Standalone SmartThings OAuth — Authorize
standalone_oauth_link.description:
Open the following URL in your browser and authorize access. Then paste the full redirect URL **or** just the authorization code here.

{auth_url}

standalone_oauth_samsung.title: Standalone SmartThings OAuth — Samsung Account (optional)
standalone_oauth_samsung.description: Optionally enter your Samsung Account credentials to enable IoT-level access (required for some Family Hub features). Leave blank to skip.

oauth.title: Reuse SmartThings OAuth credentials
oauth.description: Select an existing HA core SmartThings integration to borrow its OAuth2 credentials. Tokens will refresh automatically.

pat.title: SmartThings Personal Access Token
pat.description: Tokens created after 2024-12-30 expire every 24 hours. You will need to reauthenticate after each expiry.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate SmartThings
reauth_confirm.description: Your SmartThings token has expired. Please enter a new token from https://account.smartthings.com/tokens

error.invalid_code: Invalid authorization code or redirect URL. Please copy the code or full redirect URL after authorizing.
error.samsung_partial_credentials: Provide both Samsung email and password, or leave both blank to skip.
